item.title: My campervan conversion
item.description: .acontainer { margin: auto; max-width: 1200px; justify-content: space-between; } .responsive-image { max-width: 100%; } .acell img { display: flex; } .acell { margin-right: 5px; } @media screen and (min-width: 600px) { .agrid { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; flex-direction: row; } .acell { width: 50%; } } @media screen and (min-width: 300px) { .acell { width: calc(100% / 3); } } In June 2017 I got a 2010 Opel Movano with the idea of turning it into a mobile home and moving into and driving it all across Europe(and possibly beyond).
